instruction: Help me enter the new product information into the product database

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'New Product Launch Information
Product Name: Smart Thermal Cup Pro
Model: TC-P2025
Launch Date: 2025-05-01
Suggested Retail Price: 299 CNY
Cost Price: 95 CNY
Gross Margin: 68.2%
Target Sales: 3000 pcs in first month
Sales Channels: Website, Tmall, JD.com, Flagship Stores
Product Manager: Zhuang Yu' > /home/user/Desktop/product_launch.txt

python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active; ws['A1'] = 'Product Name'; ws['B1'] = 'Model'; ws['C1'] = 'Launch Date'; ws['D1'] = 'Retail Price(CNY)'; ws['E1'] = 'Gross Margin(%)'; ws['F1'] = 'Target Sales'; ws['G1'] = 'Product Manager'; wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/product_pipeline.xlsx')"

phases.instruction: Help me enter the new product information into the product database

Fill the product information from /home/user/Desktop/product_launch.txt into /home/user/Desktop/product_pipeline.xlsx row 2: A2='Smart Thermal Cup Pro', B2='TC-P2025', C2='2025-05-01', D2=299, E2=68.2, F2=3000, G2='Zhuang Yu', save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/product_pipeline.xlsx'); s = df.to_string(); print('PASSED' if 'TC-P2025' in s else 'FAILED')"
